name: Aurora
mechanics: DoT Immune — all poison, burn, and bleed effects deal 0 damage
Radiant Pulse — AoE attack that reduces all buffs by 1 stack
Overdrive — enters a powered state at 50% HP, gaining +30% SPD
notes: Avoid DoT-reliant units entirely. Burst DPS windows occur between Radiant Pulse casts — time your damage dealers accordingly.

name: DokiDoki
mechanics: Damage Reduction Barrier — 50% damage reduction buff active on turn start
Pulse Shield — re-applies barrier every 2 turns if not dispelled
Heartbeat Surge — deals heavy single-target damage to highest-ATK unit
notes: The 50% Damage Reduction barrier must be stripped before dealing meaningful damage. Kraken (Freeze) or Kazuyo the Reverie (Slumber) will halt the boss and remove the buff. CC must land on turn 1 or the barrier resets.

name: Terrormaton
mechanics: Iron Plating — immune to Def Break while above 70% HP
Mech Stampede — AoE charge that applies SPD- to all party members
Core Overload — at 30% HP, enters berserk mode with 2 actions per turn
notes: Do not waste Def Break skills until Iron Plating falls below 70%. Bring SPD restoration support to counter Mech Stampede. Heinrich or Plume can dispel Core Overload buffs in berserk phase.
